title: 1.0 Introduction > 1.2     Scope
text_content: This document evaluates the applicability of the product-specific standards, laws, and/or directives that must be met to obtain and maintain market access in target markets.  Additional standards may be included for evaluation based upon customer requests and commercial considerations. This document identifies the product-specific standards, laws, and/or directives that apply to the entire device or product.
